text.title: k8s-deployment-workloads Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for k8s-deployment-workloads as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using the same endpoint for liveness and readiness with the same timing, or checking database connectivity in the liveness probe.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A database outage will trigger liveness failures and restart all pods, making the situation worse. Liveness should only check that the process itself is not hung.
